title: muhlenbergia gigantea
intro: Muhlenbergia gigantea, also known as Big Bluestem, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Muhlenbergia gigantea typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or salves for topical application.
